steps.title: Connect nitrate to the claim
steps.content: The scientists think lava dislodged deep nitrate and released it upward. The evidence must therefore show elevated nitrate in lava-affected seawater at measured depths above where the lava plunged.

steps.title: Compare affected water
steps.content: The matching data show nitrate concentrations were substantially higher in lava-affected seawater than outside it in both measured depth ranges. A discusses phosphate, C compares nitrate with phosphate only inside the affected area, and D describes nitrate outside the affected area. The answer is B.
